title: Tripleurospermum phaeocephalum
taxonomy: Tripleurospermum phaeocephalum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to Japan and is also known as Japanese hawk's beard. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Tripleurospermum, which is closely related to the genus Anthemis. Tripleurospermum phaeocephalum is further classified as a member of the subgenus Serida within the genus. Its classification is also supported by phylogenetic studies that suggest its close relationship to other species in the same genus.
